mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS has positive 3-month growth, rising employment income supports household spending and earnings expectations, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month PAYEMS growth is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in less than 50% of walk-forward observations or Rank IC is below 0.03 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A FEDFUNDS crossing above 2.0% raises the discount rate applied to equity cash flows and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered FEDFUNDS crossings above 2.0% are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward instances.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL is rising over 6 months while FEDFUNDS is also rising over 6 months, markets price persistent inflation and policy tightening, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint rising-CPI and rising-FEDFUNDS signal has nonnegative mean 60-day excess return or a rolling 3-year hit rate below 50% for negative returns.

mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month RSAFS growth signals firm consumer demand and stronger revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if RSAFS 3-month growth crossings above zero are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in less than 50% of walk-forward observations.

mechanism_narrative: A UNRATE increase greater than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months signals labor-market deterioration and rising recession risk, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of observations or the conditional mean return is not below baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in INDPRO below its 6-month moving average signals weakening production and operating leverage pressure, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO crosses below its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO downside crossings do not reduce average 60-day S&P 500 returns versus unconditional returns or produce negative-return hit rates below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: When HOUST rises over 3 months while FEDFUNDS is flat or falling, housing demand improves without additional rate pressure, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint housing-up and rates-flat-or-down condition has lower mean 60-day S&P 500 returns than baseline in two consecutive rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS exceeds 2.0% while UNRATE is below 4.0%, tight policy in a still-strong labor market increases late-cycle valuation risk, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
regime_hint: late-cycle restrictive policy with low unemployment
failure_condition: Reject if this joint condition is followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered walk-forward observations.
